title: WorkflowPlan
description: Return value of plan_workflow(). Describes planned steps without executing anything.

status.description: Always dry_run on success; failed if input is invalid

skipped_steps.description: Steps skipped due to missing tools

blockers.description: Steps blocked by missing required dependencies

errors.description: Blocker messages that would prevent execution

plan_json.description: Path to the written plan.json file
